summary: Completed testing of Photo Editor bug fixes (Iteration 41). All 21 pytest tests pass. Verified: 1) Photo upload working, 2) Background removal returns has_transparency=True, 3) GET /api/photo-editor/photos?limit=10 respects limit, 4) Frontend Edit tab is default, 5) 'Generate AI Listing from These Photos' navigates to /ai-listing-creator with photos.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error - TypeError: fromisoformat: argument must be str in seller_dashboard.py line 862
minor.note: Pre-existing bug, not related to Photo Editor fixes

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/upload requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/upload successfully uploads single photo
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/upload can upload multiple photos
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/upload fails with empty list (400)
Backend: GET /api/photo-editor/photos requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/photo-editor/photos?limit=10 returns max 10 photos
Backend: GET /api/photo-editor/photos uses default limit of 20
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/remove-background requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/remove-background returns 404 for invalid photo
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/remove-background returns has_transparency=True
Backend: Background removal updates photo record with has_background_removed=True
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/remove-background-batch requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/remove-background-batch fails with empty list (400)
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/remove-background-batch limits to 10 photos max
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/finalize requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/finalize returns finalized photos
Backend: GET /api/photo-editor/backgrounds doesn't require auth
Code Review: PhotoEditorModal.jsx has activeTab='edit' as default
Code Review: PhotoEditorModal.jsx uses limit=10 for loadPhotos
Code Review: SellerDashboard.jsx navigates to /ai-listing-creator with photos
Code Review: AIListingCreator.jsx receives photos from location.state
Frontend: Photo Editor modal opens correctly
Frontend: Edit tab is active by default when photos exist
Frontend: Edit tools (Remove Background, Auto-Enhance, Manual Adjustments) visible
Frontend: 'Use X Photos for Listing' button works
Frontend: 'Generate AI Listing from These Photos' button visible after finalize
Frontend: Navigation to /ai-listing-creator works
Frontend: AI Listing Creator receives photos from Photo Editor (shows toast 'Loaded X photo(s) from Photo Editor')
action_items: FIX (MEDIUM): /api/seller/performance endpoint has TypeError in seller_dashboard.py line 862 - datetime.fromisoformat receiving non-string value
critical_code_review_comments: PhotoEditorModal.jsx correctly uses limit=10 in loadPhotos (line 148)
SellerDashboard.jsx correctly navigates to /ai-listing-creator with state containing photos and fromPhotoEditor flag (lines 1022-1026)
AIListingCreator.jsx correctly uses useLocation hook and handles photos from Photo Editor (lines 594-607)
Background removal using rembg is working correctly and returns has_transparency=True
seed_data_creation: Used existing test photos in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo Editor bug fixes verified. All reported issues fixed: 1) activeTab now defaults to 'edit' instead of 'upload', 2) loadPhotos uses limit=10, 3) 'Generate AI Listing from These Photos' button now navigates to /ai-listing-creator with photos in state. Background removal was already working correctly with rembg. Note: /api/seller/performance has a pre-existing bug (TypeError in fromisoformat) that should be fixed separately.
